questions.q: What is this article mainly about?

questions.explanation: 根據這篇文章,下列何者「為真」? 下來」? (A) 醫生對於天生缺陷的成因很清楚。 (A) 存下一分錢才是賺一分錢。 (B) 大多的天生缺陷對新生兒是致命的。 (B) 呆子總是賺不到錢。 (C) 大多的天生缺陷要花大筆錢治療。 (C) 錢不一定總能帶來快樂。 (D) 很多天生缺陷早期就可以發現。 (D) 有錢能使鬼推磨。

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 108-5-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: In what section of a newspaper can we probably read the article?
options: Health ▲ 閱讀下文,回答第 37-41 題。 Some people might find out that they act or think like their mothers in some ways when they become grownups. What their mothers taught them in childhood would be passed on without their knowledge. This is never strange at all and it is common around the globe. Mothers would pass on words of wisdom to children generation after generation. Therefore, being like your mother doesn’t sound bad. Mothers’ words of wisdom have been a source of strength and hope to most people whenever life is down. A mother’s comforting words always make a person feel better and have courage to go forward. For lots of moms, words of wisdom include teaching their children about the importance of being positive. Being positive can conquer any problem and many people find themselves saying the same thing to their own kids. Regarding teaching children to be responsible, the concept involves the parts kids don’t like to do, such as homework and house chores. In addition, mothers’ words of wisdom guide their children to be generous to people around them, family and friends included. Most of all, mother’s words of wisdom instruct their children to tell right from wrong. For example, one phrase we often hear is “it is more blessed to give than to receive,” which teaches that there is joy in the act of giving. “Money doesn’t grow on trees” tends to teach children the idea that money must be earned by hard work and sweating. Money is never easy to acquire and everyone should be careful how much you spend. Most common words of wisdom have been taught through years, and will still be true even hundreds of years after. The values of being positive, responsible, and generous are universal. Those words of wisdom are believed as the most beautiful words on the lips of mankind. They show you the light when you just see the dark.
questions.explanation: 我們可能在報紙哪個版面讀到這篇文章? 2 僅 1 個空格正確。 (A) 娛樂版 (B) 分類廣告版 0 2 個空格皆錯誤。 (C) 運動版 (D) 健康版 Question 37-41 II. 句子重組 有些人發現當他們長大之後行為和想法在某些方面 都跟他們的母親很相似。在孩提時候他們母親所教他們
